LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: A R G U E D. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. ASSIGNEE HOGE, FENTON, JONES & APPEL, INC.'S MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PETITIONER FAILED TO MAINTAIN ITS EVIDENTIARY BURDEN. PETITIONER FAILS TO SHOW THAT BRAND FORCE, INC. IS A MERE CONTINUATION OF RESPONDENT OR THAT THE TWO ENTITIES MERGED, OR THAT ASSETS WERE TRANSFERRED FROM THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO BRAND FORCE, INC. WITHOUT ADEQUATE CONSIDERATION. MCCLELLAN V. NORTHRIDGE PARK (2001) 89 CAL.APP.4TH 746. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RICHARD KRAMER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER RV BRANDAU MARKETING, INC. DBA VISUAL PRESENCE RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT SEISMICOM, INC. $15,585.70 PRINCIPAL, $920.40 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,506.10, SEE SCANNED "JUDGMENT"

calendar.matters:
Mtn To Amend Judgmnt
Off Calendar May-22-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. ASSIGNEE HOGE, FENTON, JONES & APPEL, INC.'s Motion To Amend Judgment is off calendar. Duplicate entry. Judge: Richard Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Motion To Amend Judgment
Off Calendar May-22-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Allison R. Ara, Esq. of Hoge Fenton Jones & Appel, Tel. 408.947.2412, for petitioner/assignee and moving party;
Steven J. Garrett, Esq. of O'Connor & Associates, Tel. 415.693.9960, for defendant and opposing party.

RULING: A R G U E D. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. ASSIGNEE HOGE, FENTON, JONES & APPEL, INC.'s Motion To Amend Judgment is denied without prejudice. Petitioner failed to maintain its evidentiary burden. Petitioner fails to show that Brand Force, Inc. is a mere continuation of respondent or that the two entities merged, or that assets were transferred from the judgment debtor to Brand Force, Inc. without adequate consideration. McClellan v. Northridge Park (2001) 89 Cal.App.4th 746. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Richard Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar May-01-2013 Discharged

Ntc Of Motion To Amend Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-25-2013 Continued To May-22-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
ASSIGNEE HOGE, FENTON, JONES & APPEL, INCORPORATED'S Motion To Amend Judgment
IS Continued on the court's own motion to May 22, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 25, 2013. at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Apr-17-2013 Continued To May-01-13 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings not reported.

Allison R. Ara, Esq., appearing for Hoge, Fenton, Jones & Appel, Inc., assigness for Judgment Creditor Brandau Marketing, Inc., dba Visual Presence.
Steven J. Garrett, Esq., appearing for Judgment Debtor David Flaherty. David Flaherty not present in court.

An Order of Examination for David Flaherty, Chief Executive Officer, President, Seismicon, Inc. was issued by the court on December 10, 2012.
After argument of respective counsel the court Ordered the OEX to be re-scheduled to May 1, 2013 at 2:00 PM, in Department 514. Court Ordered Mr. Flaherty to bring any documentation necessary to the hearing on May 1, 2013. Court ordered Mr. Flaherty to pay 3 hrs of attorney's fees to Judgment Creditor at the rate of $225.00 per hour. Court ordered counsel to meet and confer in good faith at least 24 hours before hearing.
Court ordered Counsel Allison R. Ara to prepare an order for the court's signature.
